fresh_facts.claim: The US deployed approximately 2,500 Marines from the 31st Marine Expeditionary Unit aboard the amphibious assault ship USS Tripoli and other vessels to the Middle East on March 13-14, 2026.
Israeli operations conducted ongoing strikes on Hezbollah targets in Lebanon on Friday, March 13, 2026, as part of broader US-Israeli bombardment of Iranian military sites.
Iran reported over 2,000 military deaths since the war began 14 days prior to March 14, 2026.
Iran's newly appointed Supreme Leader Mosha Baham was reportedly injured in a recent attack, with exact timing unclear.
President Masoud Pezeshkian discussed de-escalation with Egypt's leader on Friday, March 13, 2026.
A missile struck a helipad at the US Embassy compound in Baghdad, with video showing smoke but no immediate US casualty report.
A drone strike in northern Iraq on Thursday killed a French soldier.
The US conducted bombing of military targets on Iran's Kharg Island, described as one of the most powerful raids in Middle East history.
fresh_facts.source: News reports and Trump social media

fresh_facts.claim: A US refueling flight crashed in Iraq on Thursday, killing 6 service members; the incident was under investigation and not reported as shot down.
US cumulative death toll reached 13 service members as of March 14, 2026.
Iranian security forces increased street presence to suppress dissent and encouraged pro-government demonstrations during the bombardment.
President Trump urged Iranian opponents to topple the regime but noted they face a 'big hurdle,' while offering $10 million for information on Iranian leaders.
The US conducted strikes on over 90 military targets on Kharg Island, with blasts in Tehran killing IRGC-linked commander Morteza Darbari.
Fifteen people were killed in an Isfahan factory strike on March 14, 2026, according to Fars News.
Three Popular Mobilisation Forces members were killed in Baghdad on March 14, 2026, according to Reuters.
US President Donald Trump rejected fresh ceasefire efforts on March 14, 2026, prioritizing military pressure over talks.
Iran threatened US-linked ports, docks, and economic sites in the UAE in response to strikes.
Iranian armed forces spokesman Abolfazl Shekarchi warned neighbors against trusting US 'hollow power' on March 14, 2026.
The UN Security Council adopted Resolution 2817 (2026) condemning Iran's missile and drone strikes on Gulf states.
Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei died from an initial air raid, but no immediate regime collapse or major defections occurred.
fresh_facts.source: Institute for the Study of War

fresh_facts.claim: Mojtaba Khamenei issued his first statement as an acting figure on March 12, 2026, according to the Institute for the Study of War.
fresh_facts.source: Institute for the Study of War

fresh_facts.claim: The opposition National Council of Resistance of Iran (NCRI) announced a provisional government framework on February 28, 2026, led by Maryam Rajavi.
NCRI supporters rallied in Berlin on March 11, 2026, backing the provisional government framework amid Khamenei's death.
US strikes on Kharg Island spared oil infrastructure on March 14, 2026.
A nationwide internet blackout in Iran exceeded 13 days as of March 13, 2026, enabling preparations for mass killings and purges under 'war conditions.'
Iranian officials threatened crackdowns on dissent following January 2026 protests amid the internet blackout.
A jailbreak occurred in Mariwan amid strikes hitting IRGC and Basij bases.
Iran projected 'wartime unity' via Quds Day mobilization amid bombardment on March 14, 2026.
Three US troops were killed over the weekend prior to March 14, 2026, with some deaths attributed to friendly fire.

regime_fall.current_status: US-Israeli military campaign has intensified with strikes on Kharg Island and 90+ military targets, killing IRGC commander Morteza Darbari, while Mojtaba Khamenei consolidates power amid internal clerical opposition and a 13+ day internet blackout enabling regime crackdowns. Trump administration continues rejecting ceasefire efforts, has deployed 2,500 additional Marines, and explicitly encourages regime opponents, while Iranian leadership attempts to project wartime unity despite significant military degradation and succession uncertainties.
regime_fall.last_major_event: US conducted over 90 strikes on Kharg Island on March 14, killing IRGC-linked commander Morteza Darbari, while Trump rejected ceasefire efforts and Iran's newly elevated Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei faces internal clerical challenges to his legitimacy.
